title: All The Fan Made Discs
description: This Fabric mod add 79 New discs to minecraft, theses discs are made by the Minecraft community.
body:
# All The Fan Made Discs

**All The fan Made Discs** is a mod about adding new minecraft music discs, in order to add more goals and a sens of adventure to the game.

It adds 79 new music discs to the game, add 26 of them to the vanilla loot tables, 3 craftable discs and 3 in news structures and also custom mob loot.

![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D41cWGi2/images/ea373f297232f0c8f2cc6cabaee2472be9c73acf.jpeg)

This mod is inspired from the resources packs "All Fan Made Discs Minecraft" Part 1,2,3,4,5 and 6 by yomikester238.

[(The originals ressources packs)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/collection/123393/all-the-fan-made-discs/)

For the moment only 25 out of 78 discs are obtainnable in survival mode (**WIP**).

Here is a Ressource pack to add compatibility with the round disc feature of the mod [Visual Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-overhaul)  : [**RoundDiscs-ATFMD**](https://github.com/SuperNoobYT/RoudDiscs-ATFMD/releases)

__**Video :**__

[*Presentation video by Yomikester238*](https://youtu.be/DnU7GpLZIjE)


[*French presentation video (english subtitle)*](https://youtu.be/A1o7z7NstLM)

**Disclamer**

Theses songs and discs textures are subject to their own copyright licenses.


**FAQ :**

 

**Will you make a forge port ? : No, i don't have time to learn forge modding, i'am focusing on adding new features.**

**Are there plans to backport ? : No, i'am focusing on the latest minecraft version, and adding new features.**

**/!\ Keep in mind this mod is still under developpement**
